Use of вҲҶнҗё=н‘ҡн‘җвҲҶнңғ Use of вҲҶнҗё=н‘ҡнҗҝ Use of н‘ғ= вҲҶнҗё вҲҶн‘Ў P = 79 W so not 110 W [Use of show that value for m gives 71 W] (allow ecf from (a)) Or t = 8.5 min not 12 mins so the energy is not transferred at a rate of 110 W [Use of show that value for m gives 7.8 min (467 s)] (allow ecf from (a)) Or вҲҶнҗё= 7.92Г—10 J not 5.65Г—10 J so the energy is not transferred at a rate of 110 W [Use of show that value for m gives 4.06Г—10 J] (allow ecf from (a)) Example of calculation вҲҶнҗё=6Г—0.022 kgГ—4180 J kg вҲ’1 K вҲ’1 Г—22.5 K=1.24Г—10 J вҲҶнҗё=6Г—0.022 kgГ—3.34Г—10 J kg вҲ’1 =4.41Г—10 J н‘ғ= ( 1.24Г—10 +4.41Г—10 ) J (12Г—60) s = 5.65Г—10 =78.5 W Or н‘Ў= ( 1.24 Г— 10 + 4.41 Г— 10 ) J 110 W =514 s = 8.5 min Or О”нҗё=110 WГ— ( 12Г—60 ) s=7.92Г—10 J (1) (1) (1) (1) Total for question 14 7 Number Answer Mark

Conversion of beats minute вҲ’1 to Hz [Accept calculation of T] Use of нң”=2ПҖн‘“ Use of н‘Ј=вҲ’нҗҙнң”sinнң”н‘Ў with sinнң”н‘Ў=1 A = 1.5 (mm) [Allow max displacement = 2A] Example of calculation н‘“= 60 s =2.37 Hz нң”=2ПҖГ—2.37 s вҲ’1 =14.9 rad s вҲ’1 нҗҙ= 22.0Г—10 вҲ’3 m s вҲ’1 14.9 s вҲ’1 =1.48Г—10 вҲ’3 m=1.48 mm (1) (1) (1) (1) there must be an acceleration/(resultant) force that is proportional to the displacement from the equilibrium position and (always) acting towards the equilibrium position (For equilibrium position accept: undisplaced point/position or fixed point/position or central point/position) [MP2 Accept acceleration/force is in the opposite direction to the displacement] [An attempt to use the equation can only score if all terms are defined and the minus sign explained] (1) (1) Total for question 15 6 Number Answer Mark Use of 1 u = 1.66 Г— 10 вҲ’27 kg Use of вҲҶнҗё=н‘җ вҲҶн‘ҡ вҲҶE = 7.6 Г—10 вҲ’13 (J) Example of calculation вҲҶн‘ҡ= ( 230.0331вҲ’226.0254вҲ’4.0026 ) u=5.1 Г—10 вҲ’3 u вҲҶн‘ҡ=5.1Г—10 вҲ’3 Г—1.66Г—10 вҲ’27 kg=8.47Г—10 вҲ’30 kg вҲҶнҗё= ( 3.00Г—10 m s вҲ’1 ) Г—8.47Г—10 вҲ’30 kg=7.62Г—10 вҲ’13 J (1) (1) (1) (1)

(In a closed system) total energy is constant so the student is incorrect.
